node_limits.description: UTS iHPC only: per-pool simultaneous node-occupation caps from the iHPC portal 'My Node Limits' (not SSH-queryable). Each entry is an independent pool (node families sharing one cap), e.g. Research general pool mars/venus/mercury=2 plus a TURINGGROUP turing=2. quotas.capacity advises held-vs-limit headroom per pool.

owner.description: Attribution label for the campaign ledger (DISCLOSURE, not a credential): which collaborator owns this account. Non-secret — never a real account id.

allocation.description: Attribution label for the campaign ledger (DISCLOSURE, not a credential): which allocation this account draws on. Non-secret — never a real account id.

node_gpu_count.description: UTS iHPC only: GPUs physically present on a node of this profile's node_family. Bounds the campaign placement's fabricated gpu_indices so a large maxConcurrent never plans jobs onto non-existent GPU indices. When unset, campaign.submit uses a conservative default and clamps maxConcurrent to it.

node_scheduler.description: UTS iHPC only: how the daemonized progressor should be invoked on the node. Optional; absent means 'console' (a clean argv). 'runner' is a deliberate extension point ('uv'/'cron_reboot' are reserved for the daemonized progressor to honor later) and is disclosed as node_scheduler_runner by redactProfile. The old uv_bin/dir node-path sub-options were never consumed post-internalization and were dropped.
